title: LocalizedContentPageResponse
description: RFC 0103 (spec/v1/localized-content.md §D). The resolved delivery response for `GET /v1/content/pages/{slug}`. `locale` is the negotiated locale (equals the `Content-Language` response header). `sections[]` carry the ALREADY-MERGED section bodies — resolution (the per-section field merge §C) happened server-side, so no `localizations` map appears in the response. Only `published`, `enabled` sections are present, in render order.

generatedAt.description: When the resolved response was generated.

locale.description: The negotiated locale actually used (BCP-47). Equals the `Content-Language` response header.

page.description: Resolved page metadata (status omitted — only published pages are delivered).

sections.description: Resolved sections in render order; each body is the merged result, not the raw record.

data.description: The merged section body for the negotiated locale (exact → family → base shallow overlay).
